Sports Scene

Copied

Athletes from around the world have made the Olympic Village their temporary home in Paris. Sports Scene checked out on how they have settled in, and asked them how they're feeling right now in terms of their competitive form, what events they want to watch, and who are their favorite Chinese athletes.
